Welcome back everybody. The second core habit is abundance. So thinking with abundance and I'm sure some of you guys have read things like this and it's like oh yeah I should think with abundance but most people don't actually do it. Alright and there's a reason that people who are where they are say that and it's because it's true it's just hard it's simple not easy. So this is one of my favorite quotes by Zig Ziggler. You will get all that you want in life if you help more people get what they want. Okay and the quote is misspelled here but that's what it is and so essentially the more people you help get what they want the more you will get what you want and the concept there is that you're giving first. Okay and that should go with every relationship that you have in life like abundance is giving first it's giving without expectation of reciprocity it's giving to your wife without expecting not at this for that or tit for tat it's giving first. There's in game theory there are they've tested this in terms of they use the prisoner's dilemma which is kind of a I won't get into it but essentially you can test whether going giving all in just giving giving giving going tit for tat which is someone who's a matcher and then a taker is someone who always wants to get but doesn't want to give anything so that's the person who keeps asking you for your secrets of how you're running your gym but doesn't give you anything back right on a scale from one to ten ten being absolute giving and zero being absolute taking the people who do best in business are eights okay there are people who give first but if someone screws them they smack them on the wrist but then they forgive and give again so they give a chance for that person to redeem themselves okay versus a ten and the reason for if someone just continues to give and give and give you set yourself up to be taken advantage of but you want to give first and then if someone ever like you give first without expectation if someone ever does screw you you rectify the issue and then you forgive and you try again all right that is what an eight out of a ten does from a giving standpoint everything lower than that is not enough abundance and you will miss out on opportunities in life and you don't know who is the person who has who has inside of them the opportunity to introduce you to someone to make a connection and I can tell you the amount of times in my life I've benefited from this far outweighs the cost of giving and not getting anything back and a lot of that is because giving changes you and so right now if you if you feel like you're always operating in scarcity it's because you don't give and because of that you're operating from fear and if you operate from a point of fear everyone feels it around you your staff feels it your partner feels it it's all it's a it's a negative lens to view the world through if you give no matter how little you have you're abundant because you say you have enough and the only way to have enough is to be able to give some away and that can be your time that can be your you know gift of of helping someone it can be a gift of of writing a note to you know your your team whatever it is right and I'll get to the tactics in a little bit but giving changes you one of the other things with abundance is that the more you teach the more you learn and so like if you've ever remembered anything that you had to like learn in school and they and there's one lesson that you had to get up in front of the class and teach the lesson I don't know if you ever did this at your school but that one lesson you know better than any of the other lessons at the school because you actually had to learn it in order to teach it and so the more like the more you teach and the more you help others the more you learn and so even with abundance you have selfish outcomes that are positive like you get better when you teach people and so take every opportunity you can teach your employees teach other gym owners teach everyone you can because the more you do that the more you will learn and again from a selfish standpoint you will gain status by providing value like if you look at the groups that we have the people who have the most data to the ones who provide the most value so you want to have high status in a group give the most right and people want to help people they perceive as giving and that's based on reciprocity it's one of the most like ingrained human psychological behaviors that we witness is that reciprocity is extremely strong right which is why we try and use that in as many selling situations as we can is that when you give people feel indebted and it's counter it's counter-tribe it's counter-group from like an evolutionary standpoint to not give back because that means you're not a contributor to the group which means they don't need you they don't want you and so it's so strongly embedded in us that you can use that to your advantage by always giving first and then everyone starts giving back right you should give without expectation but on a whole by and large that is what ends up happening and so this is something that I think is really interesting that I want you to kind of take to heart we had a we had a vote inside of our gym lords group for who's going to be gym lord of the year and I want to say the top 10 gyms that were voted eight of them were seven-figure gyms and so the mathematical likelihood that if you had you know at the time of us taking that we had 550 gym owners in legacy right we had 550 gym owners and we say who's the most given and out of 550 here the top 10 and then we say who who makes the most money and then the fact that eight out of the top 10 were the same is not a coincidence it would be like the people who give the most get the most and so if you can adopt this in how you operate as a human and as a business owner you will make more money and you will be happier all right and one of the things that is kind of I want everyone to take home is that like understanding that there is unlimited money the size of the pie the limit on your business is never anything besides you okay like there's nothing that limits your business besides you there's no gym across the street there's no nothing like there's unlimited money if you can deliver unlimited value all right and if you're not making enough money means you're not helping enough people get what they want to go back to that first quote all right so if people are leaving like we compete against the couch we compete against Netflix we're not competing against each other and I just want to be very clear here all right so we need to continue trying to get better not try it like I don't want to share with that guy because he's in the same market as me it's stupid it's ridiculous and it doesn't affect you it doesn't until you even knew that that person was there it didn't change anything either right and there's probably 400 other gyms in your area either and they're all going in and out of business so forget about it just focus on you and understand that like there are more people than you will ever be able to help in your market and this is a fun fact that I think you might find interesting is that in one of our markets we have three gyms that are in the exact same building all right forget about market they're in the same building and two of them are seven figure gyms and one of them runs $700,000 a year plus on me okay same model what does that tell you it tells you if you can execute there will always be business for those who provide value okay and so I need you to operate from that standpoint okay so here are the abundance tactics there's only three and it's so this one will be short and very simple for you because abundance is a little bit more of a mindset thing if you have something that works share it if you have everyone like I think Emerson said every man is my superior in some way in that I learned of him all right so you are better than everyone at one thing it might be tiny but you should share it and what happens is when you share it people reach out to you and then you help them and then they are better than you at something else and then guess what they help you with that okay so when you make a piece of content inside of the group and you share a training and like this is how we do our onboarding or this is how we do our interviews or this is how we do our sales or this is what our room looks like and we tweak the thing and it looks even better and it works better whatever it is share it and expect nothing in return but what you will see is that you will receive so much more in return than you gave all right I don't want you to give for that reason because you'll give for the wrong reasons but if you do this you will make so much more money I promise you okay the second thing is that every day from an abundance standpoint tell someone on your team your family your clients a feligin lord or a vendor every day that you appreciate them okay so this is a little bit more than gratitude because it's it's it's pointed at someone and you're actually like when you when you come from that standpoint of just saying hey I just want to speak into you like I I so value what you provide on a regular basis and I just want to say it means a ton to me if you take two minutes and just say that to one person every day you will make that person's day so much by that act and I can't tell you at times that I have done this and had someone message me back like an essay about how like it was it was so profound and that they they just needed that needed to hear that in that moment like every single one of us has this power and like you have this power to make another human's like day or week and it takes you two minutes like why not do it right and the thing is is when you start from that when you start operating from that standpoint your mind will operate better you will be wiser you will make better decisions because you will see people for who they are from a place of understanding the last thing is hop on with other gym worlds one to two times a month help each other out and it's kind of goes from the first thing like if you have something that works share it in the group but also reaching out to other gym worlds that are there who you know you both comment on something and you think each other are funny or you meet them at the summit like stay in touch hey let's hop on let's let's share what's going on with you what's going on with me let's let's see what we can we can help each other out with because there are always things that someone else is better than you and I can't tell you how how powerful it is to build a network of people who are doing the exact same thing as you like there's so many things to learn and even just just someone else who sees you for who you are and is going through the same trials and tribulations that you are going through it's just it's just it's a it's incredibly rewarding and so from a tactical standpoint one two three if you have something to work share expect nothing back tell someone on a on a daily basis someone that you appreciate them all right I think it's much better than saying what you are grateful for but who you are grateful for and letting them know and then third connect with the other gym lords on a regular basis don't just do it once after you see this but do it on a regular basis put it in your calendar that this is the week you're going to reach out and you're going to schedule time for an hour and a half and and you're going to talk to one of the gym lords and you're going to connect and you're going to help each other out with things that you're you're each week on all right so that concludes our abundance tactics to make your life even better and have a hard high ROI on legacy
